name: part_013
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_013.webm

scenes.description: Transition from the live stage to the studio setting.
Yuzuki Choco talks to the viewers about her new song, upcoming schedules, and the member-only stream.
Ending credits roll with an instrumental version of the new song.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、みんなどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: Alright, so, how did everyone enjoy it?

subtitles.original: 今回の新曲「君の秒針」は...
subtitles.english: My new song, "Thy Second Hand,"

subtitles.original: ...志土の真央様が作詞...
subtitles.english: ...has lyrics by Shido no Mao-sama...

subtitles.original: ...そして二目飽様が作曲、編曲...
subtitles.english: ...and composition and arrangement by Nigume Aki-sama...

subtitles.original: ...そして編曲にはなんと、加藤貴之様も加わっていただきました！
subtitles.english: ...and Takayuki Kato-sama also joined in for the arrangement!

subtitles.original: いや、今回は...
subtitles.english: Well, this time...

subtitles.original: ...ボイスドラマ連動企画の第1弾として...
subtitles.english: ...as the first part of a voice drama collaboration project...

subtitles.original: ...ストーリー全体のね、テーマソングを担うような、珠玉の楽曲に仕上がっております！
subtitles.english: ...it has turned into a gem of a song that serves as the theme song for the whole story!

subtitles.original: ま、ドラマの鍵となるね、秒針というメタファーにも要注目してください！
subtitles.english: Please also pay close attention to the metaphor of the "second hand," which is key to the drama!

subtitles.original: 志土さんだけでなく、この後ね、豪華アーティストの皆様にもたくさん書いていただいたので...
subtitles.english: Not just Shido-san, but many other wonderful artists have also written for this project...

subtitles.original: 皆様、リリースをお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: ...so everyone, please look forward to the release!

subtitles.original: こちらの「君の秒針」は、各音楽サイトは...
subtitles.english: This song "Thy Second Hand" will be on various music sites...

subtitles.original: ...ちょっと間が空いちゃうんだけど、3月15日の0時から配信予定でございます！
subtitles.english: ...it'll be a little while, but it's scheduled to be released on March 15th at midnight!

subtitles.original: ま、ちょっとね公開まで時間が空くから、それまでこの配信、何度も見返してみてください！
subtitles.english: Since there's some time until the release, please re-watch this stream many times until then!

subtitles.original: 聴き込んでね！
subtitles.english: Listen to it over and over!

subtitles.original: そして、そして...
subtitles.english: And also...

subtitles.original: MVもね、ちょっと後日公開なので、楽しみにしててくださーい！
subtitles.english: The MV will be released at a later date, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、今日のチョコの生誕ライブはどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: So, how was Choco's birthday live today?

subtitles.original: ま、この後は...
subtitles.english: Well, after this...

subtitles.original: ...すぐに、冒頭、最初の方でお披露目した...
subtitles.english: ...immediately, as I announced at the beginning...

subtitles.original: ...ノエルちゃんとラミたんとの3人の「初恋大戦争」のMV公開があって...
subtitles.english: ...there will be the MV release of "Hatsukoi Daisakusen" with Noel-chan and Lami-tan...

subtitles.original: そのあと、メン限で...
subtitles.english: And after that, in the member-only stream...

subtitles.original: ♥このあとのメン限♥
subtitles.english: ♥Coming up for Members♥

subtitles.original: ...ちょっとライブと、撮影会の続きとか...
subtitles.english: ...we'll have a bit more live and the continuation of the photo session...

subtitles.original: アフターライブ / 特別撮影会
subtitles.english: After Live / Special Photo Session

subtitles.original: ...ちょっとね、メン限でしか見れないシチュエーションドラマとかやるので...
subtitles.english: ...and situation dramas that you can only see there, among other things...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマ2本
subtitles.english: 2 Situation Dramas

subtitles.original: (朝食inベッド？泥沼ランチ？絶対見逃せない（かも) )
subtitles.english: (Breakfast in bed? Messy lunch? You can't miss it! (Maybe))

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ、気になる人は見に行ってください！
subtitles.english: So if you're interested, please do come and watch!

subtitles.original: それでは、また後でお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, I'll see you later!

subtitles.original: お疲れいとは〜ん！
subtitles.english: Otsukarei-to!
